creator: lifanov@freebsd.org
text:
I'll add cabextract, curl, and xdg-open to cover most use cases.

ar - always available
unrar, unzip, 7z - transparent fallback with helpful message if not present
aria2c, wget - superseded by curl (used if all three are present)
sha1sum - fallback to something that's always available
sudo - doesn't enable anything that will work on FreeBSD anyway
perl - heavy dependency, single use in winetricks, helpful error message if missing
